Copper Nail: A dedicated workbench with six herb-and-grinding slots, a built-in water tank (8 bowls capacity, tracked as Water Charges), and a copper stove. Drag a water container or shallow water source (river, pond) to add a charge. Light the stove to heat the water and speed up herb drying.
铜钉: 一个专用工作台，带有六个草药研磨槽、内置水箱（8碗容量，以水量格计）和铜炉。拖动水容器或浅水源（河流、池塘）以添加一格水量。点燃炉子以加热水并加速草药干燥。

Copper Nail: Build a tea station with an integrated copper tea kettle, copper stove, and rotary quern for grinding tea leaves. Requires 2 planks, 4 twine, 1 copper tea kettle, 1 copper stove, 1 rotary quern, and 15 large stones.
铜钉: 建造一个带有内置铜茶壶、铜炉和旋转磨盘的茶站，用于研磨茶叶。需要2块木板、4根麻绳、1个铜茶壶、1个铜炉、1个旋转磨盘和15块大型石头。

Copper Nail: Slots (×6): Place fresh herbs — they dry passively over time. Use 'Grind All' to mill every dried or millable item at once. Water Tank: Drag a water container to add a Water Charge (up to 8), or drag a river, pond, or stream card directly (1 charge, 15 min). Drag an empty clay bowl to draw cold water back out. Light the stove to heat the water for tea brewing.
铜钉: 槽位（共6个）： 放置新鲜草药——它们会随时间被动晾干。使用「研磨全部」一次性研磨所有已干燥或可研磨的物品。 水箱： 拖动水容器以添加一格水量（最多8格），或直接拖动河流、池塘或溪流卡（每次1格，15分钟）。拖动空陶碗以取出冷水。点燃炉子以加热水用于泡茶。
添加橡木作为燃料（96小时）
添加3根树枝作为燃料（24小时）

Copper Nail: Light the stove with any fire source.
Turn the rotary quern to grind every dried herb or millable root placed on the station.
铜钉: 转动旋转磨盘，研磨放置在站台上的所有已干燥草药或可研磨根茎。

Copper Nail: Pour water from any container into the tank.
铜钉: 将任何容器中的水倒入水箱。

Copper Nail: Collect water from a river, pond, or stream to fill the tank (1 charge per action).
铜钉: 从河流、池塘或溪流中取水以注满水箱（每次1格）。

Copper Nail: Fill an empty clay bowl with cold water from the tank.
铜钉: 从水箱中向空陶碗注入冷水。

Copper Nail: Fill an empty clay bowl with boiled water from the heated tank.
铜钉: 从加热水箱中向空陶碗注入沸水。

Copper Nail: The water tank is empty — pour some water in first.
Either the tank is empty or the water is not hot enough yet.
铜钉: 水箱已空或水温尚未够热。

Copper Nail: Break the station down into its main components.
铜钉: 将站台拆解为其主要部件。

Copper Nail: Remove items from the station first.
铜钉: 请先将站台上的物品移除。

Copper Nail: Collect charcoal and ash from the stove.
铜钉: 从炉子中收集木炭和灰烬。

Copper Nail: A lit tea station. The stove burns steadily, heating the built-in water tank. Fresh herbs in the six slots dry rapidly. Drag a water container or shallow water source to add a Water Charge; drag an empty clay bowl to draw boiled water once Water Temp reaches 50%. Fire will go out when fuel runs empty.
铜钉: 一个已点燃的茶站。炉子稳定燃烧，加热内置水箱。六个槽位中的新鲜草药迅速干燥。拖动水容器或浅水源以添加水量格；拖动空陶碗以在水温达到50%时取出沸水。燃料耗尽时火焰熄灭。

Copper Nail: Slots (×6): Herbs dry faster while lit. Use 'Grind All' to mill dried or millable items. Water Tank: Drag a water container or river/pond card to add a Water Charge (max 8). Drag an empty clay bowl to draw boiled water — requires at least 1 Water Charge AND Water Temp ≥ 50%. Consumes fuel over time.
铜钉: 槽位（共6个）： 点燃时草药干燥更快。使用「研磨全部」研磨已干燥或可研磨的物品。 水箱： 拖动水容器或河流/池塘卡以添加水量格（最多8格）。拖动空陶碗以取出沸水——需要至少1格水量且水温≥50%。随时间消耗燃料。

Copper Nail: Use the stove's flame to light tinder or a campfire.
铜钉: 用炉火点燃引火物或营地火堆。

Copper Nail: Pack up the station and carry it.
Remove items from the station first.
铜钉: 请先将站台上的物品移除。

Copper Nail: A disassembled tea station packed for transport. Place it in the environment to set it up — six herb slots
column5: 拆解打包的茶站，便于运输携带。将其放置在环境中安装——六个草药槽、集成水箱与铜制炉灶。

Copper Nail: Usage: Use the Place action to set up the tea station. Fill the water tank by dragging full water bowls onto it, fuel the stove, and light it to heat the water.
铜钉: 用途： 使用放置动作安置茶站。通过拖动装满水的陶碗向水箱注水，添加燃料，然后点燃以加热水。

Copper Nail: Set up the tea station in your environment.
铜钉: 在您的环境中安置茶站。

Copper Nail: A sealed copper chest with thick insulated walls. Keeps food dramatically colder
铜钉: greatly slowing spoilage and keeping animals out.
column4: 一个带有厚实隔热墙的密封铜制箱子。大幅降低食物温度，极大减缓腐败速度并防止野兽入侵。

Copper Nail: Spoilage: Slows to 20% of normal rate. Animal-safe: Yes. Wildlife cannot raid this chest.
铜钉: 腐败： 腐败速度降至正常的20%。 防野兽： 是。野生动物无法袭击此箱子。

Copper Nail: Spoilage: Slows to 20% of normal rate. Animal-safe: Yes. Wildlife cannot raid this chest.
铜钉: 腐败： 腐败速度降至正常的20%。 防野兽： 是。野生动物无法袭击此箱子。

Copper Nail: Set the copper chest down in your environment.
铜钉: 将铜制箱子放置在您的环境中。

Copper Nail: Take the copper chest apart to recover some of the sheets.
铜钉: 拆解铜制箱子以回收部分金属片。

Copper Nail: Pick up the copper chest to carry it.
Empty the chest before picking it up.
Build a sealed copper chest with thick insulated walls. Dramatically slows food spoilage and keeps animals out. Requires 4 metal sheets, 4 planks, 6 copper nails, and a hammer.
铜钉: 建造一个带有厚实隔热墙的密封铜制箱子。大幅减缓食物腐败并阻止动物入侵。需要4块金属片、4块木板、6颗铜钉和一把锤子。

Copper Nail: Cook down hemp seed oil over a fire to produce clean lamp oil.
铜钉: 在火上熬煮麻籽油以制作清洁的灯油。

Copper Nail: A hammered copper flask for storing lamp oil. Holds 6 charges of oil — enough to fully refuel a lantern twice. Drag onto a lantern to pour in one charge.
铜钉: 一个用于储存灯油的锤制铜瓶。可储存6格油量——足以为提灯完全补充两次燃料。拖到提灯上以倒入一格油量。

Copper Nail: Fill: Drag Oil items onto the flask (6 items = full). Use: Drag the flask onto a Metal Lantern to pour in one full charge of oil.
铜钉: 注油： 将油脂物品拖到油瓶上（6个 = 满格）。 使用： 将油瓶拖到金属提灯上以倒入一整格油量。

Copper Nail: Poured oil from the copper flask into the lantern.
铜钉: 从铜制油瓶向提灯中倒入油脂。

Copper Nail: Hammer two copper sheets into a sealed flask for storing lamp oil, wrapped with a leather carry strap. Holds enough for two full lantern refills. Requires 2 copper sheets, 1 medium leather, and a hammer.
铜钉: 将两块铜片锤打成密封油瓶用于储存灯油，并缠绕皮革提手。可存储两次完整提灯补充量。需要2块铜片、1块中型皮革和一把锤子。

Copper Nail: Start with a Tea Blending Station Kit. Place it to set up a 6-slot workstation that passively dries herbs and, once lit, cooks, heats, and boils — perfect for crafting teas and tinctures.
铜钉: 初始携带一个茶站套件。放置后可设置一个6槽工作台，被动晾干草药，点燃后可烹饪、加热和煮沸——非常适合制作茶饮和酊剂。
慢速过火（烧焦）并降低质量

Copper Nail: A hammered copper helmet offering solid head protection. Can be recycled in a furnace. MUST BE EQUIPPED ON EQUIPMENT SLOT TO WORK.
铜钉: 一顶锤制铜头盔，提供坚实的头部防护。可在熔炉中回收。必须装备在装备槽上才能生效。

Copper Nail: Break apart the helmet to recover materials.
Craft a hammered copper helmet for head protection. Requires 2 copper sheets, 4 copper nails, 1 small leather, 2 sinew, and a hammer.
铜钉: 制作一顶锤制铜头盔用于头部防护。需要2块铜片、4颗铜钉、1块小皮革、2根肌腱和一把锤子。

Copper Nail: Hammered copper bracers protecting both arms. Can be recycled in a furnace. MUST BE EQUIPPED ON EQUIPMENT SLOT TO WORK.
铜钉: 锤制铜护臂，保护双臂。可在熔炉中回收。必须装备在装备槽上才能生效。

Copper Nail: Break apart the bracers to recover materials.
Craft hammered copper bracers for arm protection. Requires 2 heated lumps of metal, 4 copper nails, 1 small leather, 2 sinew, and a hammer.
铜钉: 制作锤制铜护臂用于手臂防护。需要2块加热金属锭、4颗铜钉、1块小皮革、2根肌腱和一把锤子。

Copper Nail: Hammered copper greaves protecting both legs. Can be recycled in a furnace. MUST BE EQUIPPED ON EQUIPMENT SLOT TO WORK.
铜钉: 锤制铜护腿，保护双腿。可在熔炉中回收。必须装备在装备槽上才能生效。

Copper Nail: Break apart the greaves to recover materials.
Craft hammered copper greaves for leg protection. Requires 2 heated lumps of metal, 4 copper nails, 1 small leather, 2 sinew, and a hammer.
铜钉: 制作锤制铜护腿用于腿部防护。需要2块加热金属锭、4颗铜钉、1块小皮革、2根肌腱和一把锤子。

Copper Nail: A sturdy suit of copper armor offering strong torso protection. Can be recycled in a furnace. MUST BE EQUIPPED ON EQUIPMENT SLOT TO WORK.
铜钉: 一套坚固的铜制铠甲，提供强力躯干防护。可在熔炉中回收。必须装备在装备槽上才能生效。

Copper Nail: Break apart the armor to recover materials.
Craft sturdy copper armor for torso protection. Requires 4 copper sheets, 4 copper nails, 1 medium leather, 4 sinew, and a hammer.
铜钉: 制作坚固的铜制铠甲用于躯干防护。需要4块铜片、4颗铜钉、1块中型皮革、4根肌腱和一把锤子。

Copper Nail: A portable copper brazier on a stick tripod. Set it up in your environment and fill with oil for a bright long-burning light source.
铜钉: 一个架在三脚架上的便携铜制火盆。在环境中安置并注入油脂，以获得明亮持久的光源。

Copper Nail: Set up the copper brazier in your environment.
铜钉: 在您的环境中安置铜制火盆。

Copper Nail: A placed copper brazier, currently unlit. Fill with oil and light from any fire source to illuminate and warm the area.
铜钉: 一个已放置的铜制火盆，当前未点燃。注入油脂并用任何火源点燃，以照亮并温暖周围区域。

Copper Nail: Usage: Add oil, then light from any fire source. Burns brighter and longer than a clay brazier. Pack up to carry.
铜钉: 用途： 添加油脂，然后用任何火源点燃。比陶制火盆燃烧更明亮、持久。打包可携带。

Copper Nail: Poured oil from the copper flask into the brazier.
铜钉: 从铜制油瓶向火盆中倒入油脂。

Copper Nail: Light the brazier with a flame.
Pack up the brazier. Remaining oil is preserved in the kit.
铜钉: 收起火盆。剩余油脂保留在套件中。

Copper Nail: A copper brazier burning oil with a bright warm flame. Burns through oil faster than a lantern but illuminates a larger area.
铜钉: 一个燃烧油脂散发明亮温暖火焰的铜制火盆。比提灯消耗油脂更快，但照亮范围更大。

Copper Nail: Usage: Illuminates a wide area and boosts morale. Extinguish before refueling.
铜钉: 用途： 照亮大片区域并提升士气。补充燃料前需先熄灭。

Copper Nail: The brazier runs out of oil.
Craft a copper brazier from metal sheets, copper nails, and long sticks. Holds 4 charges of oil and burns brighter than a lantern.
铜钉: 用金属片、铜钉和长棍制作一个铜制火盆。可储存4格油量，比提灯燃烧更明亮。
